+        # Robust masking using assistant header in templated text

+        assistant_header = '<|im_start|>assistant\n'

+        assistant_idx = text.find(assistant_header)

+        if assistant_idx != -1:

+            prompt_part = text[:assistant_idx + len(assistant_header)]

+            prompt_tokens = self.processor.tokenizer(prompt_part, add_special_tokens=False).input_ids

+            prompt_length = len(prompt_tokens)

+            labels[:prompt_length] = -100

+        else:

+            labels[:len(input_ids)//2] = -100
